columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier assigned to each customer at registration.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Customer's legal name as provided at signup.
columns.business_rules: Not validated against government ID. May contain Unicode characters for international customers.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Customer's legal name as provided at signup.
columns.business_rules: Not validated against government ID. May contain Unicode characters for international customers.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Primary contact email used for login and notifications.
columns.business_rules: Must be unique across all accounts. Some enterprise accounts may have no email if SSO is configured (nullable).
columns.quality_notes: Email is nullable for enterprise SSO accounts (about 2% of accounts)

columns.name: phone
columns.description: International format with country code used for 2FA and support contact.
columns.business_rules: Format varies by country. Not guaranteed to be unique (family plans may share a number).
columns.quality_notes: Phone numbers are not standardized — some include dashes, spaces, or parentheses

columns.name: country
columns.business_rules: Country field was added in 2020; records before that may have NULL country

columns.name: monthly_spend
columns.description: Actual billed amount in USD for the current billing cycle.
columns.business_rules: May differ from plan price due to add-ons, discounts, or proration. Enterprise customers may have custom pricing — treat as sensitive financial data.

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Indicates whether the customer's account is active.

columns.name: last_login
columns.description: Date of the customer's last login.
